scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:backend: docker compose run --rm --build backend-test npm test
scripts.test:frontend: docker compose run --rm --build frontend-test npm test
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:backend: docker compose run --rm --build backend-test sh -c 'npm run lint && npm run format:check'
scripts.lint:frontend: docker compose run --rm --build frontend-test sh -c 'npm run lint && npm run format:check'
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.typecheck:backend: docker compose run --rm --build backend-test npm run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:frontend: docker compose run --rm --build frontend-test npm run typecheck
scripts.deploy: docker compose up --build --force-recreate -d frontend && docker compose up --build --force-recreate -d backend
scripts.deploy:frontend: docker compose up --build --force-recreate -d frontend && docker compose up --build --force-recreate -d backend
